div.p: Implementation: Write-Ahead-to-Temp + Fsync + Atomic Rename Goal: Prevent index corruption during power-loss at any cycle T.
Crash Logic: If crash here, OS ignores .tmp. idx.bin remains original v1.0.
Barrier: Data moved from OS Page Cache to physical NAND/Platters.
Point of No Return: FS Inode directory entry updated. V1.1 is now the legal file head.
